trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI at 59.5 — the lowest among top-tier candidates, giving the most runway before overbought territory — combined with full signal set (MACD crossover, histogram rising, price above SMA-20) in a risk-on tape.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with the S&P 500 up 0.9% and NASDAQ up 1.0%, a constructive backdrop for momentum names. The portfolio has 5 open slots and just under $600 cash, so deploying into the highest-conviction low-RSI candidate makes sense. BLLN earns the buy — score 95, RSI only 59.5 (most headroom), and every technical signal firing — while existing holdings AMZN, QQQ, EAT, XMTR, and OLED remain in good standing with no stop-loss or profit-target triggers visible.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted broad gains on May 5, 2026, with both the S&P 500 (+0.9%) and NASDAQ (+100%) advancing as investor sentiment shifted to risk-on, likely supported by easing macro concerns and continued strength in technology and growth sectors. Momentum stocks with solid technical setups led the charge, rewarding traders positioned in high-score names with MACD crossovers and above-average price action. The move reflects a market willing to look past near-term uncertainty and rotate back into equities.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年5月5日，美國股市全面上揚，標普500指數上漲0.9%、納指上漲1.0%，市場情緒明顯轉向風險偏好。科技股與成長股領漲，技術面強勢的動能股表現尤為突出，MACD金叉且股價站上20日均線的個股普遍受到追捧。整體而言，市場已逐步消化短期不確定因素，資金重新流入股票資產。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is the strategy of buying stocks that have been trending upward — using indicators like RSI and MACD to confirm strength before entering. The idea is that stocks already in motion tend to stay in motion, especially in risk-on markets. Today's buy of BLLN exemplifies this: RSI in the sweet spot (not yet overbought), MACD bullish crossover, and price above its 20-day moving average all confirm upward momentum.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期持續上漲的股票，透過RSI、MACD等技術指標確認趨勢強度後再進場。核心概念是：已經在上升軌道中的股票，往往會繼續向上運行，在風險偏好市場中尤為明顯。今日買入BLLN正是此策略的體現：RSI處於甜蜜區間（尚未超買）、MACD出現金叉、股價站上20日均線，三重信號共同確認上行動能。
